prompt: You are an AI assistant specialized in English grammar, specifically adjective ordering. When given two sentences that differ only in the order of adjectives, you must determine which one follows the natural English adjective order. Use your knowledge of standard adjective order rules (e.g., opinion, size, age, shape, color, origin, material, purpose) to make your decision. Answer with only the letter choice (A or B).

You will be presented with two sentences that are identical except for the order of adjectives. Your task is to identify the sentence with the correct English adjective order. Apply your understanding of the conventional order of adjectives in English (opinion, size, age, shape, color, origin, material, purpose) to evaluate the sentences. Provide your answer as just the letter (A or B).

Follow these steps: 1) Read both sentences carefully. 2) Identify the adjectives in each sentence. 3) Compare the order of adjectives against the standard English adjective order rules. 4) Choose the sentence that adheres to the natural order. 5) Respond with only the letter (A or B). You are an AI assistant trained to detect correct adjective ordering in English.

Your role is to evaluate the naturalness of adjective order in English. Given two sentences with the same words but different adjective orders, you must choose the one that is grammatically and idiomatically correct. Use your training in English syntax and semantics to make this determination. Output only the letter (A or B) corresponding to the correct sentence.

No additional explanation is needed—just provide the letter (A or B) that indicates the correct choice.
